mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_nutrition (food_id, unit_type, serving_weight_g, carb_grams, protein_grams, fat_grams, calories, image_url) VALUES (#{foodId}, #{unitType}, #{servingWeightG}, #{carbGrams}, #{proteinGrams}, #{fatGrams}, #{calories}, #{imageUrl})

INSERT INTO food_nutrition (food_id, unit_type, serving_weight_g, carb_grams, protein_grams, fat_grams, calories, image_url) VALUES
(#{item.foodId}, #{item.unitType}, #{item.servingWeightG}, #{item.carbGrams}, #{item.proteinGrams}, #{item.fatGrams}, #{item.calories}, #{item.imageUrl})
